name: Warso
overview: Hem, becomes the last heir to his family's 900 Years Old Patola Weaving Heritage, due to untimely death of his cousin. He chooses to go for further studies in Ahmedabad where he meets a European girl who on the contrary mourns for her lost family tradition. Her pain makes Him realize he must save his Heritage.

trailers.title: Warso Official Trailer | Prashant Barot | Gaurav Paswala | Kalpana Gagdekar | Gujarati Web Series
